summary: The agent correctly identifies that SD plasma targets lipid-enveloped viruses. Since hepatitis C virus (HCV) is definitively classified as a fully lipid-enveloped virus, it is the most likely infection to be neutralized by SD plasma transfusion, making its occurrence unlikely afterward.
